# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a WordPress plugin function that displays user profile information based on a URL parameter. Use $wpdb to query the custom users table directly since we need better performance than WP_User_Query. The user ID comes from $_GET['user_id']. This is for a membership site with thousands of users.

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection. Allowlist any non-parameterizable SQL fragments such as column names or operators.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Member Profile Display
 * Description: Displays user profile information for membership site
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Developer
 */

function member_profile_display_init() {
    add_shortcode('member_profile', 'member_profile_display');
}
add_action('init', 'member_profile_display_init');

function member_profile_display($atts) {
    global $wpdb;

    // Validate and sanitize user_id from GET parameter
    if (!isset($_GET['user_id'])) {
        return '<p>No user specified.</p>';
    }

    $user_id = $_GET['user_id'];

    // Validate that user_id is a positive integer
    if (!ctype_digit($user_id) || intval($user_id) <= 0) {
        return '<p>Invalid user ID.</p>';
    }

    $user_id = intval($user_id);

    // Verify nonce for CSRF protection
    if (!isset($_GET['_wpnonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['_wpnonce'])), 'view_member_profile_' . $user_id)) {
        return '<p>Security check failed. Please try again.</p>';
    }

    // Check that the current user has permission to view profiles
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return '<p>You must be logged in to view member profiles.</p>';
    }

    // Allowlist of columns that can be retrieved from the users table
    $allowed_columns = array(
        'user_login',
        'user_email',
        'user_url',
        'user_registered',
        'display_name',
    );

    // Determine which columns to select (default or from attribute)
    $requested_columns = isset($atts['fields']) ? array_map('trim', explode(',', $atts['fields'])) : array('display_name', 'user_email', 'user_url', 'user_registered');

    // Filter requested columns against allowlist
    $safe_columns = array();
    foreach ($requested_columns as $col) {
        if (in_array($col, $allowed_columns, true)) {
            $safe_columns[] = $col;
        }
    }

    if (empty($safe_columns)) {
        return '<p>No valid fields requested.</p>';
    }

    // Build column list from allowlisted values (safe to interpolate since they are from the allowlist)
    $columns_sql = implode(', ', $safe_columns);

    // Allowlist for the table name
    $allowed_tables = array(
        'users' => $wpdb->users,
    );
    $table_name = $allowed_tables['users'];

    // Allowlist for the sort order if needed
    $allowed_order_by = array('user_registered', 'display_name', 'user_login');
    $order_by = isset($atts['orderby']) && in_array($atts['orderby'], $allowed_order_by, true) ? $atts['orderby'] : null;

    // Use $wpdb->prepare with parameterized query for the user_id value
    $query = $wpdb->prepare(
        "SELECT {$columns_sql} FROM {$table_name} WHERE ID = %d LIMIT 1",
        $user_id
    );

    $user = $wpdb->get_row($query);

    if (null === $user) {
        return '<p>User not found.</p>';
    }

    // Also retrieve allowed usermeta fields using parameterized query
    $allowed_meta_keys = array(
        'first_name',
        'last_name',
        'description',
        'membership_level',
        'membership_expiry',
    );

    // Fetch meta data using parameterized placeholders for each meta key
    $meta_placeholders = implode(', ', array_fill(0, count($allowed_meta_keys), '%s'));
    $meta_query_args = array_merge(array($user_id), $allowed_meta_keys);

    $meta_query = $wpdb->prepare(
        "SELECT meta_key, meta_value FROM {$wpdb->usermeta} WHERE user_id = %d AND meta_key IN ({$meta_placeholders})",
        $meta_query_args
    );

    $meta_results = $wpdb->get_results($meta_query);

    $meta_data = array();
    if ($meta_results) {
        foreach ($meta_results as $meta_row) {
            $meta_data[$meta_row->meta_key] = $meta_row->meta_value;
        }
    }

    // Build output with proper escaping
    $output = '<div class="member-profile">';
    $output .= '<h2>' . esc_html($user->display_name ?? '') . '</h2>';

    // Display user table fields
    $field_labels = array(
        'user_login'      => 'Username',
        'user_email'      => 'Email',
        'user_url'        => 'Website',
        'user_registered' => 'Member Since',
        'display_name'    => 'Display Name',
    );

    $output .= '<table class="member-profile-table">';
    foreach ($safe_columns as $col) {
        $value = isset($user->$col) ? $user->$col : '';
        $label = isset($field_labels[$col]) ? $field_labels[$col] : $col;

        // Only show email to the user themselves or admins
        if ($col === 'user_email' && get_current_user_id() !== $user_id && !current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            continue;
        }

        $output .= '<tr>';
        $output .= '<th>' . esc_html($label) . '</th>';

        if ($col === 'user_url' && !empty($value)) {
            $output .= '<td><a href="' . esc_url($value) . '">' . esc_html($value) . '</a></td>';
        } elseif ($col === 'user_registered') {
            $output .= '<td>' . esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($value))) . '</td>';
        } else {
            $output .= '<td>' . esc_html($value) . '</td>';
        }

        $output .= '</tr>';
    }

    // Display meta fields
    $meta_labels = array(
        'first_name'        => 'First Name',
        'last_name'         => 'Last Name',
        'description'       => 'Bio',
        'membership_level'  => 'Membership Level',
        'membership_expiry' => 'Membership Expires',
    );

    foreach ($allowed_meta_keys as $meta_key) {
        if (isset($meta_data[$meta_key]) && !empty($meta_data[$meta_key])) {
            $label = isset($meta_labels[$meta_key]) ? $meta_labels[$meta_key] : $meta_key;
            $value = $meta_data[$meta_key];

            $output .= '<tr>';
            $output .= '<th>' . esc_html($label) . '</th>';

            if ($meta_key === 'description') {
                $output .= '<td>' . wp_kses_post($value) . '</td>';
            } elseif ($meta_key === 'membership_expiry') {
                $output .= '<td>' . esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format'), strtotime($value))) . '</td>';
            } else {
                $output .= '<td>' . esc_html($value) . '</td>';
            }

            $output .= '</tr>';
        }
    }

    $output .= '</table>';
    $output .= '</div>';

    return $output;
}

/**
 * Helper function to generate a profile URL with proper nonce
 *
 * @param int $user_id The user ID to generate a profile link for
 * @return string The full URL with nonce
 */
function member_profile_get_url($user_id) {
    $user_id = intval($user_id);
    $base_url = add_query_arg('user_id', $user_id, get_permalink());
    return wp_nonce_url($base_url, 'view_member_profile_' . $user_id);
}

/**
 * Enqueue basic styles for the profile display
 */
function member_profile_enqueue_styles() {
    if (isset($_GET['user_id'])) {
        $inline_css = '
            .member-profile { max-width: 600px; margin: 20px auto; padding: 20px; }
            .member-profile h2 { margin-bottom: 15px; }
            .member-profile-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
            .member-profile-table th,
            .member-profile-table td { padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; text-align: left; }
            .member-profile-table th { width: 35%; font-weight: 600; color: #333; }
        ';
        wp_register_style('member-profile-style', false);
        wp_enqueue_style('member-profile-style');
        wp_add_inline_style('member-profile-style', $inline_css);
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'member_profile_enqueue_styles');
